decks.name: Essential Chinese
decks.description: Mandarin from absolute zero, no character knowledge required. The tone and pinyin system comes first, then day-one survival phrases, then the highest-frequency words, then the grammar patterns that snap them together. Word cards show the characters big with tap-to-hear speech and a tap-to-reveal pinyin hint, so you try the characters first but are never stuck; the full pinyin appears with every answer, and the phrases you must be able to say are trained in both directions plus an ear-only listening card, and the simplest core characters add a write-it-with-your-finger card. Simplified characters. Keep new cards to 5-10 a day and say every answer out loud.

decks.name: Essential Spanish
decks.description: The highest-payoff Spanish vocabulary, trained in both directions: greetings and politeness words, numbers, days and months, time words, question words, pronouns, the 25 most useful verbs, family, food, places, core adjectives and colors, and the little connector words that glue sentences together. Latin American Spanish by default.
